mapper.select: select id, group_code, group_name from groups where group_code = #{groupCode} and status = 'ACTIVE'
insert into group_join_requests ( group_id, applicant_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{groupId}, #{applicantUserId}, #{status}, now(), now() ) returning id

select gjr.id as "requestId", gjr.group_id as "groupId", g.group_code as "groupCode", g.group_name as "groupName", gjr.status as "status", gjr.created_at as "createdAt", gjr.decided_at as "decidedAt" from group_join_requests gjr inner join groups g on g.id = gjr.group_id where gjr.applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} and g.status = 'ACTIVE' order by gjr.created_at desc, gjr.id desc

select gjr.id as "requestId", gjr.group_id as "groupId", u.id as "applicantUserId", u.user_code as "applicantUserCode", u.display_name as "applicantDisplayName", gjr.status as "status", gjr.created_at as "createdAt" from group_join_requests gjr inner join users u on u.id = gjr.applicant_user_id inner join groups g on g.id = gjr.group_id where gjr.group_id = #{groupId} and gjr.status = 'PENDING' and g.status = 'ACTIVE' order by gjr.created_at, gjr.id
select gjr.id, gjr.group_id, gjr.applicant_user_id, gjr.status from group_join_requests gjr inner join groups g on g.id = gjr.group_id where gjr.id = #{requestId} and g.status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: update group_join_requests set status = #{toStatus}, decided_at = now(), decided_by_user_id = #{decidedByUserId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{requestId} and status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.insert: insert into group_memberships ( group_id, user_id, role, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, now(), now() )
